message:
fix(patterns): correct overlap filtering to check match start position

Fix bug in PatternEngine overlap filtering where detections were being
skipped based on match END position instead of START position.

The issue:
- Previous code: skip if detection.span.1 <= overlap_len (end in overlap)
- This incorrectly skipped matches that STARTED in new text but ENDED
  within the overlap region boundary

The fix:
- New code: skip if detection.span.0 < overlap_len (start in overlap)
- If a detection starts in the overlap region, its pattern beginning
  was already visible in the previous segment
- Matches starting in new text are always kept, even if they partially
  extend into what was the overlap

This prevents false negatives where valid new detections were being
incorrectly filtered out during streaming pattern detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
